content.explanation:
**Industry Vocabulary — उद्योग के शब्द:**

**Key Industries & Their Vocabulary:**

**IT Industry (Information Technology):**
Software, Hardware, Application, Database, Server, Cloud, Cybersecurity, Algorithm, Bug, Debug, Deploy, Bandwidth

**Manufacturing Industry:**
Raw material, Production, Assembly line, Quality control, Inventory, Supply chain, Defect, Output, Batch, Capacity

**Finance Industry:**
Investment, Portfolio, ROI (Return on Investment), Equity, Revenue, Profit, Loss, Budget, Audit, Fiscal year, Depreciation

**Healthcare Industry:**
Diagnosis, Treatment, Patient, Discharge, OPD (Outpatient), ICU, Prescription, Consultation, Ward, Surgery

**Construction Industry:**
Blueprint, Foundation, Beam, Concrete, Scaffold, Contractor, Tender, Estimation, Load-bearing, Renovation

**Education Industry:**
Curriculum, Enrollment, Pedagogy, Assessment, Accreditation, Faculty, Campus, Syllabus, Lecture, Seminar
rules: Industry-specific vocabulary makes you sound professional and credible
Use correct terms: "deploy" not "upload" in IT; "audit" not "check" in Finance
Each industry has its own jargon — learn the top 20 words of your field
Abbreviations are common in industry: IT, OPD, ROI, GDP, B2B, B2C, HR
Collocations matter: "supply chain management", "quality control team", "cloud storage"
Industry verbs: IT deploys/codes; Finance audits/invests; Construction builds/designs
Formal industry emails use precise vocabulary to avoid ambiguity
content.memoryTrick:
**Each Industry has its ACTION VERB:**
• IT = deploy, debug, code, test
• Finance = audit, invest, budget, forecast
• Manufacturing = produce, assemble, inspect, dispatch
• Healthcare = diagnose, treat, prescribe, discharge
Learn the verbs, dominate the conversation!

examples.hindi: हमें product को Monday तक deploy करना है।
examples.english: We need to deploy the product by Monday.
A defect was found in the assembly line.

examples.hindi: patient को ICU से general ward में shift किया।
examples.english: The patient was shifted from ICU to the general ward.

examples.hindi: Contractor ने renovation का estimate दिया।
examples.english: The contractor provided an estimate for the renovation.

examples.hindi: Faculty meeting में नया curriculum discuss हुआ।
examples.english: The new curriculum was discussed in the faculty meeting.

mistakes.wrong: We uploaded the app to the server.
mistakes.correct: We deployed the app to the server.
mistakes.why: 'Deploy' is the correct IT term for making software live on a server
'Audit' is the correct finance term for examining accounts

mistakes.wrong: There is a mistake in the product.
mistakes.correct: There is a defect/flaw in the product.
mistakes.why: Manufacturing uses 'defect' or 'flaw' (not 'mistake') for product issues
'Designed' or 'prepared' is more professional for academic contexts

speakingTips: IT: 'We need to resolve this bug before we can deploy the next build.'
Finance: 'The quarterly audit revealed a 12% increase in operational costs.'
Manufacturing: 'Quality control rejected 5% of the batch due to defects.'

vocabulary.example: The procurement team ordered new materials.

vocabulary.hindi: बड़े पैमाने पर काम करने की क्षमता

vocabulary.example: Set a benchmark for quality performance.
All companies must ensure regulatory compliance.

practice.hindi: वह एक बड़ी कंपनी में काम करता है।
practice.english: He works in a large company.
alternatives: he is employed at a big firm.

practice.hindi: इस उद्योग में बहुत प्रतिस्पर्धा है।
practice.english: There is a lot of competition in this industry.
alternatives: this sector is very competitive.

practice.hindi: वे लोग एक नई फैक्ट्री खोल रहे हैं।
practice.english: They are opening a new factory.
alternatives: they are launching a new manufacturing unit.

practice.hindi: उत्पादन की गुणवत्ता बनाए रखनी चाहिए।
practice.english: The quality of production should be maintained.
alternatives: production quality must be kept high.
output was reduced this month.

practice.hindi: वह IT क्षेत्र में काम करता है।
practice.english: He works in the IT sector.
alternatives: he is in the information technology field.
this firm exports goods.

practice.hindi: आयात बढ़ने से व्यापार घाटा बढ़ता है।
practice.english: Increasing imports raises the trade deficit.
alternatives: more imports lead to a trade gap.
practice.hint: import = आयात, trade deficit = व्यापार घाटा

practice.hindi: उन्होंने एक नया उत्पाद लॉन्च किया।
alternatives: they introduced a new item.

practice.hindi: बाज़ार में माँग बढ़ रही है।
practice.english: The demand in the market is increasing.
alternatives: market demand is growing.

practice.hindi: वे इस महीने ज़्यादा मुनाफा कमाएँगे।
practice.english: They will earn more profit this month.
alternatives: they will make higher profits this month.

practice.english: The number of employees will be increased.
alternatives: the workforce will be expanded.

practice.hindi: उद्योग को सरकारी सहायता मिल रही है।
practice.english: The industry is receiving government support.
alternatives: the sector is getting government assistance.

practice.hindi: यह क्षेत्र तेज़ी से विकसित हो रहा है।
alternatives: this field is growing very fast.
practice.hint: developing / growing rapidly = तेज़ी से बढ़ रहा है

practice.hindi: कारखाने में श्रमिक काम करते हैं।
alternatives: labourers are employed in the factory.
